daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events Await: Falcon Heavy and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy will launch the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite, providing significant advancements in satellite internet capabilities.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream on SpaceX's official page.

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: A demonstration flight for Russia's new Soyuz-5 launch vehicle, marking a significant step in Russian space capabilities.
top_events.action: Follow updates for potential live coverage.

top_events.title: G1 Geomagnetic Storm Potential
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is predicted, offering a chance to view auroras at higher latitudes.
top_events.action: Check aurora forecasts and prepare for potential sightings at high latitudes.

alerts.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 Launch
alerts.message: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy is set to launch the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite, enhancing satellite internet capabilities. This is a significant event in the commercial space sector.
alerts.action_required: Watch the live stream on SpaceX's official page.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
